Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.sync

Class SynchroUtils

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.sync.SynchroUtils
public class SynchroUtils extends Object
Utility class for EMF//Rodin synchronisation

    • getPositionOf

      public static int getPositionOf(LightElement parent, IInternalElement element) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the position of the given element among the children of its type.
      Parameters:
      parent - the root element that shall contain the element
      element - the element we search the position for
      Returns:
      the position of the given element among the children of its type or -1 if the element has not been found
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • getPositionAmongSiblings

      public static int getPositionAmongSiblings(LightElement parent, IInternalElement element) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the position of the element's next sibling in the list of all the children of the given parent
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

      Returns the next sibling of the given element.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
